Diversity Survey

This optional survey helps us evaluate our diversity and inclusion efforts. Participation is voluntary and refusal to submit the survey will not affect your job application. The answers to these questions are not seen on an individualised basis and your submission will only be used to assess our diversity and inclusion efforts.

Do you agree to allow Mollie to contact you about job opportunities for up to 1 year?
